title: MikroTik Cloud Core Router, CCR2004-16G-2S+
description: CCR2004-16G-2S+ is a 19" rack router from the new line of CCR routers, which comes with the highest ratio power per 1 core of all CCRs, which is the most important aspect for more demanding operations based on processing per-connection (eg. QoS). The router is powered by a CPU with a 64bit ARM architecture with a clock speed of 1 700 MHz, has 4GB of DDR4 RAM and 128MB of NAND storage The router has 16Ã Gigabit LAN , 2Ã SFP+ slot (possibility to connect 1G and 10G modules) and serial port type RJ45. On the back, the router has two fans and 2 redundant sources Powerful rackmount device with ARM 64bit architecture CPU 1700 MHz, 4 cores, 4GB RAM, 128MB NAND Redundant power - 2 sources Active cooling due to 2 fans Interface: (16) Gigabit, (2) SFP/SFP+ Pre-installed RouterOS L6 Device Rack mounts (2) Power cord
